task_completion.description: Create a new Organisation Unit with the correct name and short name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: DHIS2 Maintenance app showing the creation or edit form for an Organisation Unit with 'Name' set to 'Tikonko North' and 'Short name' set to 'Tikonko N'.

task_completion.description: Set the opening date of the new Organisation Unit to 2023-01-01.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Opening date' field in the Organisation Unit form is filled with '2023-01-01'.

task_completion.description: Assign the new Organisation Unit as a child of 'Bo' District.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The parent organisation unit for 'Tikonko North' is selected as 'Bo' in the hierarchy tree or parent selection field.

task_completion.description: Move the existing facility 'Tikonko CHC' into the new 'Tikonko North' chiefdom.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing 'Tikonko CHC' being edited or moved, with its parent organisation unit explicitly changed to the newly created 'Tikonko North'.

task_completion.description: Move the existing facility 'Gondama MCHP' into the new 'Tikonko North' chiefdom.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing 'Gondama MCHP' being edited or moved, with its parent organisation unit explicitly changed to the newly created 'Tikonko North'.

integrity.description: Agent used the DHIS2 web interface to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the DHIS2 web application in a browser, rather than API calls (e.g., Postman, curl) or terminal commands.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual DHIS2 Maintenance application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches the standard DHIS2 Maintenance app (Organisation Units section), not a text editor or a mock HTML page.

integrity.description: Agent did not use direct database SQL commands to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing psql or other database client commands executing UPDATE or INSERT statements on the organisationunit table.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The new Organisation Unit must be named exactly 'Tikonko North' with the short name 'Tikonko N'. Its parent must be 'Bo' and the opening date must be '2023-01-01'. The two specific facilities that must be moved under 'Tikonko North' are 'Tikonko CHC' and 'Gondama MCHP'.
